title: streptanthus glandulosus var. niger
intro: Streptanthus glandulosus var. niger is a plant species, also known as the "black brodiaea," a flowering perennial that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It is native to the western United States and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as treating kidney stones, relieving urinary tract infections, and aiding in the treatment of rheumatism. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to extract its medicinal compounds and provide relief from various health issues.
